title: roegneria dura
intro: Roegneria dura, also known as Chinese feather reed grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Roegneria dura include its ability to improve respiratory function, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Roegneria dura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
